TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspacePrimariesCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Identifies color primaries using ITU-T H.273 / ISO 23001-8 Coding-Independent Code Points (CICP) values.
Docs.remarks:
## Remarks
`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` enumerates the standard color primaries defined by the ITU-T H.273 and ISO/IEC 23001-8 specifications. These values are used as parameters when calling <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp*> to create a CICP-specified color space.
Each member's numeric value corresponds directly to the "Colour primaries" code point in Table 2 of ITU-T H.273.
## Examples
Creating a BT.2020 wide-gamut color space:
```csharp using var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq, SKColorspaceMatrixCoefficients.Identity, SKColorspaceRange.Full); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp GenericFilm = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Generic film color primaries (code point 8), based on D65 white point and C-illuminant.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp ItuTH273Value22 = int32(22)

Docs.summary: ITU-T H.273 value 22 color primaries (code point 22), intended for EBU Tech 3213-E and related consumer electronics standards.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec2020 = int32(9)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 color primaries (code point 9), used for ultra-high-definition television with a wide color gamut.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G color primaries (code point 5), used for PAL and SECAM analog television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M color primaries (code point 4), used for NTSC analog television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 color primaries (code point 6), used for standard-definition television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 color primaries (code point 1), used for HDTV and sRGB.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteEg4321 = int32(12)

Docs.summary: SMPTE EG 432-1 color primaries (code point 12), defining the Display P3 (P3-D65) gamut used on Apple displays.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteRp4312 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: SMPTE RP 431-2 color primaries (code point 11), defining the DCI-P3 gamut used in digital cinema.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 color primaries (code point 7), used for early HDTV production.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(10)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 color primaries (code point 10), using CIE XYZ with a D50 white point.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: Unknown or unspecified color primaries (code point 0).
